description: A vibrant sunset over a harbor with multiple boats silhouetted against the sky. The sun sits low on the horizon as a glowing red-orange disc. The sky is painted in broad, expressive strokes of fiery orange, coral red, golden yellow, and patches of blue-grey cloud. Several sailing vessels and steamboats are dark silhouettes on the shimmering water. The sea reflects the warm colors of the sky in rippling golden and blue tones. The composition is impressionistic with thick, visible brushwork throughout.
